headline: James Dodges Bankruptcy with Million-Dollar Payout, Year of Lost Wages and More
articleBody:
James suffered a broken ankle after falling off a ladder at work. To make matters worse, James was a hemophiliac—what may have been a mundane hospital visit for some would turn into several weeks of therapy and rehabilitation. After “recovering” and flying to Guatemala to visit family, James’ life was impacted.

Outcome: James received a million-dollar payout and a year of lost wages.
